info.title: Cluely API
info.description: REST API for Cluely authentication, room management, gameplay, and the Content Platform (dictionaries, discovery, sharing, and moderation).

post.summary: Creates a new dictionary owned by the authenticated user.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional UUID. Reuse the same key to replay this command without creating a duplicate.

delete.summary: Archives a dictionary (soft delete); it can be restored.

get.summary: Returns a dictionary's details, if the caller is permitted to see it.

post.summary: Adds words to the dictionary's draft.

patch.summary: Replaces a word in the dictionary's draft.

delete.summary: Removes a word from the dictionary's draft.

post.summary: Validates the dictionary's draft without publishing.

Publishes the dictionary's draft into a new immutable version.
Repeating the request with the same Idempotency-Key returns the original version.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required UUID. Retrying with the same key returns the original published version.

get.summary: Lists dictionaries owned by the authenticated user.
Lists public and shared-with-me dictionaries the caller can discover.
Returns the versions of a dictionary the caller is permitted to see.

post.summary: Submits a published version for moderation review (owner).
Approves a version under review, making it discoverable (moderator).
Unblocks a version, returning it to review (moderator).
Retires a version from all new use (moderator).
Shares a dictionary with another account.
Clones a dictionary from one of its published versions into a new owned dictionary.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional UUID. Reuse the same key to replay this command without creating a duplicate.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Requests.AddWordsRe.description: Request to add words to a dictionary's draft.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Requests.AssignRole.description: Request to assign a participant role.

team.description: Team assignment: Red, Blue, or Unassigned.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Requests.AssignTeam.description: Request to assign a participant to a team.

sourceVersionId.description: The source published version to seed the clone from.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Requests.CloneConte.description: Request to clone a dictionary from one of its published versions.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Requests.CreateCont.description: Request to create a new dictionary (owned by the authenticated user).

hostNickname.description: Display name for the host player.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Requests.CreateRoom.description: Request to create a new game room.

nickname.description: Display name for the joining player.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Requests.JoinRoomRe.description: Request to join an existing room by room code.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Requests.ReplaceWor.description: Request to replace a word in a dictionary's draft.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Requests.SelectDict.description: Request to select a dictionary for the room.

granteeId.description: The account to grant view/select access.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Requests.ShareConte.description: Request to share a dictionary with another account.

count.description: Number of cards the clue relates to (1-9).

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Requests.SubmitGues.description: Request to submit a card guess.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Requests.UpdateCont.description: Request to update a dictionary's metadata.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Requests.VersionAct.description: Request identifying a published version for a review/moderation action.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Responses.CloneCont.description: Response returned when a dictionary is cloned.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Responses.ContentCr.description: Response returned when a dictionary is created.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Responses.ContentDe.description: Detail view of a dictionary and the versions the caller may see.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Responses.ContentUp.description: Response returned when a dictionary's metadata is updated.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Responses.ContentVe.description: Summary of a single published dictionary version.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Responses.CreateRoo.description: Response returned when a room is created.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Responses.JoinRoomR.description: Response returned when a player joins a room.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Responses.PublishCo.description: Response returned when a dictionary is published.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Responses.RoomProje.description: Role-filtered room projection for read-only queries.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Responses.ValidateC.description: Response returned when a draft is validated.

Cluely.Api.Contracts.Responses.WordCount.description: Response returned after a draft word-count change.

Bearer.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme.
